title: oldenlandia cinereoviridis
intro: Oldenlandia cinereoviridis, also known as yellow vine or yellow gentian, is a plant species native to parts of Asia and Australia, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia cinereoviridis include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and treating various infectious diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
